title: Asana AI Teammates emphasize context, checkpoints, and control
claim: Asana positions AI Teammates as collaborative agents with full or topic-specific context that keep teams informed through checkpoints and operate under user control.
source_snippet: AI teammates can synthesize research, analyze data, and flag risks while showing their work.
implication: ProductOS should make agent checkpoints and visible work state first-class in auto-research instead of burying autonomous steps.
followup_questions: Which ProductOS research checkpoints should be mandatory before downstream planning or release claims?
